Driver and management functions for the ICE40LP display, including boot sequence and color handling.


## Files
- **[ice40lp.c](ice40lp.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the ICE40LP display, including DMA handling, display updates, and error management.
- **[ice40lp.h](ice40lp.h.md)**: Defines display color enumeration and functions for filling the display with color or stripes.
- **[ice40lp_definitions.h](ice40lp_definitions.h.md)**: Defines structures and configurations for ICE40LP display device management.
- **[ice40lp_internal.c](ice40lp_internal.c.md)**: Functions for managing the iCE40LP display, including SPI transactions, programming, and power control.
- **[ice40lp_internal.h](ice40lp_internal.h.md)**: Internal functions and definitions for controlling the ICE40LP display driver.
- **[snowy_boot.c](snowy_boot.c.md)**: Functions for controlling the display boot sequence, including splash screen, update progress, and error codes.
- **[snowy_boot.h](snowy_boot.h.md)**: Functions for controlling the display FPGA in bootloader mode, including showing logos and errors.
